creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Libreoffice: "For users who don’t need the latest features and prefer a release that has undergone more testing and bug fixing, The Document Foundation maintains the LibreOffice 7.3 family, which includes some months of back-ported fixes and is currently at version 7.3.6."

And this is exactly what is needed for a professional usecase. If you use a tool for your daily work and living, the last thing needed is sitting on a version that is battered by testing and bug fixing. 

Please recognize the needs of users who experience hell when their work gets hit by upgrading to the latest ...

So please, please keep a port with the LTO-Version.
